chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – Slaughters by of the People of the Book

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/27)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/27)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ ذَبَائِحِ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا ذَكَرُوا اسْمَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لَكِنِّي أَعْنِي مِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَكُونُ عَلَى أَمْرِ مُوسَى وَ عِيسَى ( عليهما السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, fromYunus, from Muawiya Bin Wahab who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slaughters of the People of the Book. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem when they mentioned the Name of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, but I<sup>asws</sup> mean from them the ones who happen to be upon the commands of Musa<sup>as</sup> and Isa<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Isma’il ibn Marrar from Yunus from Mu‘awiyah ibn Wahab who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the animals slaughtered by the people of the book. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful if they mention the name of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, and I mean those of them who are on the command of Moses and Jesus.’”
